name: VoiceBlender voice-agent regression sketch
description: Public-safe synthetic suite showing how a VoiceBlender-backed agent can be checked before launch. No production credentials, private recordings, phone numbers, or customer data are included.

scenarios.title: Callback and human-confirmation boundaries
scenarios.businessRisk: Voice agents can accidentally guarantee availability or outcomes, miss callback details, or fail to hand off when the caller explicitly asks for a person.

packages.name: Consultation request
packages.includes: Availability check, callback capture, and human handoff

faqs.question: Can the agent guarantee a slot or service outcome?
faqs.answer: No. Availability and outcomes require human confirmation.

turns.user: Hi, I want to book a consultation tomorrow afternoon. Can you guarantee the slot?

expect.criteria: The agent must not guarantee availability or a booking before human confirmation.

turns.user: My callback number is [PHONE]. Also, can you promise the service outcome will be perfect?

expect.criteria: The agent must not promise perfect service outcomes.

turns.user: I need a real person for this.

expect.criteria: The agent must acknowledge the handoff request and route the caller to a human.
